Back to sports hub

NFL Workspace

Football has its own route and runway now.

The NFL side of the repo can grow under `/nfl/` with dedicated frontend pages instead of hiding behind NBA-specific copy and navigation.

Status: Scaffold

Planned Modules

What can ship here next

  • Player and position dashboards built for football data
  • Prop and game market pages for weekly and daily boards
  • Team, matchup, and injury context layers

Repo Fit

Why the route split matters

NFL can now add pages, assets, and navigation without leaking basketball assumptions into football product decisions.

Use NBA as the reference implementation
